name: Guest user completes full checkout flow

steps.name: And user verifies homepage is loaded
Then search results should be displayed
When user adds product to bag
Then product should be added successfully
Then cart page should be displayed
When user continues as guest user
Then user should be on address page
Then shipping button should be visible
Then user should reach payment or checkout page

fullName: Nykaa End to End Checkout: Guest user completes full checkout flow
